description_long: This ornate sconce features a classic chandelier design with six elegantly curved arms radiating from a central, turned column. Each arm supports a candle-like light fixture, complete with faux wax drips and pointed, flame-shaped bulbs, evoking the appearance of traditional candelabras. The arms are robust and symmetrically arranged, with decorative bobeches at the base of each candle. The central column is vertically segmented with ornamental detailing, and the entire fixture is suspended by a sturdy metal chain. The color palette is predominantly a muted, matte white with subtle metallic accents around the candle holders. This sconce exudes a vintage, baroque-inspired aesthetic, making it suitable for upscale urban interiors or historic-themed public spaces.
description: A vintage chandelier-style sconce with six candle-like lights on ornate, curved arms and a central decorative column, finished in matte white with metallic accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six arms symmetrically fanned out, with clear visibility of the central column and chain.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the depth of the arms and the layered arrangement of the candle fixtures.
description_view_2: Rear-side view with partial overlap of the arms, emphasizing the curvature and the back of the central column.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the profile of the arms and the vertical alignment of the central structure.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a vintage, baroque-inspired design with ornate, curved arms and a central turned column, evoking the elegance of classic European chandeliers.
